title: cyclopteris regia
intro: Cyclopteris regia, also known as the royal cyclopteris, is a species of extinct fern that was once found in the tropical forests of North America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclopteris regia are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Cyclopteris regia is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
